title: Rewrite-Retrieve-Read: A New Paradigm for Retrieval-Augmented LLMs

defines.name: Rewrite-Retrieve-Read
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented LLM framework that rewrites the input query before retrieval to better align the search request with the needed knowledge and improve downstream reading performance.

problem: Existing retrieval-augmented LLM pipelines use fixed queries that do not match the knowledge actually needed, limiting retrieval quality and downstream performance.
